scripts.query:recent: wrangler d1 execute iso-me-onboarding-analytics --remote --command "SELECT received_at,event_name,onboarding_step,authorization_status,tracking_intent,paywall_context,purchase_outcome FROM onboarding_events ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 20;"
scripts.query:funnel: wrangler d1 execute iso-me-onboarding-analytics --remote --command "SELECT onboarding_step, COUNT(DISTINCT install_id) AS users, COUNT(*) AS events FROM onboarding_events WHERE event_name='onboarding_step_viewed' GROUP BY onboarding_step ORDER BY CASE onboarding_step WHEN 'welcome' THEN 1 WHEN 'features' THEN 2 WHEN 'permissions' THEN 3 WHEN 'ready' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END;"
